violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Small paper coffee cups were being used to scoop marshmallows, nuts, and other products from containers on the shelf by the walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelves on the South wall of the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Lower shelves under the scale and coffee brewers had broken, cracked, and missing laminate. Exposed wood is no longer a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelves in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
